programme.title: El ropavejero

programme.title: Capítulo 81
programme.desc: Giovanni gives his support to Mia. Fearing the Lodge might hurt Julieta, Miguel breaks up with her. By request of Diego, Facundo turns down Roberta.

programme.title: Capítulo 82
programme.desc: Joaquín breaks up with Pilar because she won't sleep with him. Vico thinks that Mia told Esteban about the love letters she's been sending him. Roberta gets manipulated by Diego.

programme.title: Capítulo 83
programme.desc: Valeria pretends to be a photographer for the school to get close to Mia. Miguel warns Mia about Esteban. Roberta makes her choice of which band to stay in.

programme.title: Capítulo 84
programme.desc: Miguel and Esteban get into a fist fight. Joaquín breaks up with Vico by lying that the Lodge might come after her. However, Pilar tells Vico that Joaquín and her are dating again.

programme.title: Capítulo 85
programme.desc: Miguel admonishes Julieta for going out with her former boyfriend, who is dangerous. Valeria tells Franco she spent the day with Mia. Paola tries to seduce Diego.

programme.title: Capítulo 86
programme.desc: Miguel asks Teo to help get him in as a member at the Lodge. Mia finds out Vanessa is really the woman dating her father, Valeria. Paola is hired by León to sleep with Diego.

programme.title: Capítulo 87
programme.desc: Diego reveals to Paola he's a virgin. Miguel is asked by Franco to find Mia, who has run away after she finds out her father and Valeria had a history.

programme.title: Capítulo 88
programme.desc: Miguel comes up with a plan to get Rodrigo to invite Teo into the Lodge. Celina tells Mia that Valeria could tell her everything she want to know about her mother.

programme.title: Capítulo 89
programme.desc: Valeria tells Mía the truth about her mother. Celina is feeling smothered by Augusto. Pilar and Joaquin get back together. Téo gets a meeting with the Lodge. Diego and Paola get close. Paolo lies to León about her and Diego.

programme.title: Amorío al descubierto
programme.desc: Arriaga va a meta imagen con Victoria. Arriaga descubre a Nelson con Kendra. Odette y Kendra planean contra Victoria. Adriana busca su hija.

programme.title: Liliana enamorada
programme.desc: Paula visita a Cristina. Arriaga es entrenado para disparar. Cristina quiere vender tamales a sus vecinos. Lili le dice a su mamá q cree estar enamorada de Guzmán. Niki va con Victoria al nutriólogo. Kendra invita Nelson a su depa.

programme.title: Celos y violencia
programme.desc: Salcero se va a bailar salsa. Felipe pide a Guzmán q le de dinero q perdió apuestas. Arriaga le regala a victoria la música q les gustó del radio. Victoria pinta a Arriaga. Kendra saca info de negocios a Nelson.

programme.title: Claustrofobia
programme.desc: Odette visita meta imagen. Victoria no acepta la oferta de Odette. Lili y Niki pelean en el club atlético. Vitoria y Arriaga van a la cita para un nuevo prospecto y quedan atrapados en el elevador.

programme.title: Defensor del abuso
programme.desc: Leo maltrata a Beatriz. Ella abandona su casa. Le pide ayuda a Guzmán. Niki casi descubre a Nelson/kendra. Arriaga/Victoria logran mantener la cita con éxito. Cristina ofrece alojo a Beatriz.

programme.title: Nuevo objetivo
programme.desc: Arriaga desenmascara a Odette. Niki cree q Guzmán defendió a su amante. Tomasina lleva el cheque al papá de Guzmán. Kendra visita a Niki para ir a visitar un diseñador. Tiene un plan para secuestrar a Niki.

programme.desc: On an Easter Sunday, 18-year-old Heidi Allen vanishes from her convenience store job. Two brothers are arrested for the kidnapping, but only one is convicted. Years later, a chilling new story emerges implicating three other men in the crime.

programme.title: Love Is War

programme.title: Be My Savior

programme.title: The Night Shift

programme.title: Bound by Honor

programme.desc: Three identical triplets with contrasting personalities navigate life and relationships while carrying the weight of a tragic car accident from their past that changed their family forever.

programme.title: Los chiles de la discordia
programme.desc: María sueña que los ángeles le dicen que para poder llegar al corazón de Albertano debe ganarse con humildad el corazón de su madre Doña Lucha, el sueño es interrumpido por el barullo del tianguis de los martes al que María acude cada semana a comerse un tlacoyo de masa azul. Albertano quien acompaña a su madre al tianguis se separa para ver los peces de un acuario y se encuentran con María, éste le agradece amablemente el haberle salvado la vida en el incidente de la fuga de gas y en un intercambio de halagos y agradecimiento Albertano sin darse cuenta invita María a comer , lo cual la pone feliz ya que ve en ello la oportunidad de ganarse a la familia de Albertano y trabajar su humildad. En el almacén de Don Carmelo deciden cambiar los candados por un sistema de seguridad muy sofisticado y con una tecnología que rebasa a Carmelito, quien por equivocación acciona el sistema de seguridad quedándose junto con Betsabé y Defino encerrados en la bodega. María llega a casa de Doña Lucha con un gran plato de chiles en nogada muy bien decorados, esto despierta un sentimiento de competencia en Doña Lucha, quien hará un esfuerzo por contener el enojo, ya que María tratando de quedar bien se mete hasta la cocina, desatándose una batalla campal durante la comida.

programme.title: El cumpleaños atrasado de Ludovico
programme.desc: Federica tiene un plan para hacer que Ludovico la lleve a comer a un nuevo restaurante. La familia Peluche conoce a Eduardo Santamarina. Todo sale muy mal en la cena.

programme.title: Bibi maneja
programme.desc: Bibi quiere aprender a conducir, lo que a los P. Luche les parece una excelente idea, solo para que Bibi se convierta en su chofer. Sin embargo, cuando llevan esto al extremo, Bibi sufre un pequeño accidente.

programme.title: La jefa del Rocko
programme.desc: La mamá de Rocko viene a conocer a su nieto Morris y tiene la intención de llevarlo a vivir con ella y darle la vida que se merece. Liz se vuelve representante de Benito y le consigue un papel en una película.

programme.title: Conserjerito inglés
programme.desc: Germán y compañía toman clases de inglés en línea con Silvia. Cuando Miss Silvia reprueba a Germán, este descubre la forma de desquitarse. Rocko tiene problemas de oído y creen que se está quedando sordo.

programme.title: La toalla del mojado 2
programme.desc: Frankie recibe una visita inesperada, la famosa actriz Lyn May, quien lo inspira a que haga la película de La toalla del mojado 2. Pedro se encarga de cuidar a Luisito Jr. para que Luis pueda descansar.

programme.title: La veterinaria de Vanesa
programme.desc: Vanesa por fin cumple el sueño de tener su propia veterinaria y, con ayuda de su novio Fabián, renta el local que está en el edificio. Los López Pérez compran una lavadora nueva y la colocan en el pasillo frente al departamento de Luis.

programme.title: ¡Qué escándalo!
programme.desc: Morris aprende a tocar la batería y los vecinos se quejan por el ruido. Silvia y Luis descubren que ese ruido arrulla al bebé.

programme.title: Arturo influencer
programme.desc: Arturo se vuelve un famoso influencer de TikTok y Paco de Miguel lo busca para una colaboración. Cris recibe la visita de su hermana Esmeralda y Pedro se siente desplazado.

programme.title: El novio de Virginia
programme.desc: Silvia acude a un diplomado que dura dos días y quiere contratar a una niñera, pero Luis no está de acuerdo. Virginia le quiere declarar su amor a un chico y Germán piensa que es él.

programme.title: Bebé a bordo
programme.desc: En el segundo día del diplomado de Silvia, Luisito Jr. queda al cuidado de Pedrito, pero este permite que todos los vecinos lo cuiden y en un descuido pierden al bebé.

programme.title: Atorón
programme.desc: Es el aniversario de Benito y de Liz, pero él no tiene dinero para festejarlo, por lo que ella le pone un ultimátum para continuar con su relación. Luis y Magda discuten porque ambos quieren usar las escaleras.

programme.title: Primera palabra
programme.desc: Liz ha encontrado el lugar perfecto para que ella y Benito vivan juntos pero, ¿Benito dejará la casa de sus padres? El bebé Luisito ha dicho su primera palabra, pero Luis cree que a Silvita no le gustará cuando se entere de qué ha dicho su hijo.

programme.title: El bautizo
programme.desc: Silvita y Luis bautizarán al bebé Luisito. ¿Quiénes serán sus padrinos? Además, ¿qué tendrá que pasar para que Germán sea invitado a este evento? Benito abandona la vecindad por siempre.

programme.title: No se vende
programme.desc: La dueña del edificio falleció y sus dos hijas, 'Maty' y 'Mony' se lo disputan, dejando en medio a los vecinos y a punto de ser desalojados.

programme.title: Regresó Ale
programme.desc: Ale regresa a casa con su familia. Descubre cuál será su reacción al verla de nuevo. Además, Benito gana una audición para una serie.

programme.title: La cisterna y el charro negro
programme.desc: Los vecinos están preocupados porque el agua de la cisterna sale muy sucia.

programme.title: Capitán raquetas
programme.desc: Luis está en problemas, ya que deberá armar un plan para evitar que lo echen de su trabajo. Además, doña Magda se actualiza en la moda y se pone uñas nuevas.

programme.title: Guerra de las albóndigas
programme.desc: Lorena y Liz se pelean para saber quién de las dos prepara las mejores albóndigas enchipotladas. Además, Roco recibe la visita de su madre.

programme.title: Cumple Magda
programme.desc: Los vecinos le preparan una fiesta sorpresa a 'Doña Magda' con todo y payaso y piñata. Liz y Lorena participan en un casting para Blancanieves.

programme.title: La visita
programme.desc: Hipólito recibe la visita de su hermano gemelo. Jorjáis emprende un negocio como repartidor de comida y taxi.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: MeatEater - Louisiana Spearfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads to the Gulf of Mexico for a spearfishing adventure beneath the oil rigs that serve as artificial reefs. Joined by his spearfishing mentor Greg Fonts and Brandon Hendrickson, they target a variety of prized fish, including Cobia and red snapper. The episode captures the thrill of diving in murky waters filled with sharks and navigating the massive structures. Along the way, they showcase the rich marine life of the Gulf and the skills needed to harvest fresh seafood.

programme.title: MeatEater - Hawaii Hogs and Sheep
programme.desc: Steven Rinella, Ryan Callahan, and Danny Bolton travel to Hawaii's Big Island for a unique hunt. They stalk feral sheep in the lush mountainsides and target wild hogs on a coffee plantation, using the animals' movements through macadamia groves to their advantage. The episode highlights Hawaii's blend of hunting and conservation, ending with a Hawaiian-style feast featuring the fresh game they harvested.

programme.title: MeatEater - Hawaii Spearfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella teams up with spearfishing champions Danny Bolton and Kimi Werner.

programme.title: Pod Save the World (How Bad is Trump’s Iran Deal?)
programme.desc:
Tommy and Ben are back with a week of bad deals, high-stakes elections, and World Cup joy.
The US and Iran have agreed to a deal to end the war, but the Trump administration has refused to release the text to anyone — so the guys parse through what we think we know. The short version: it's a pretty good deal for Iran that meets almost none of the goals Trump set out before the war started, and the nuclear issue hasn’t even been touched yet. Then the guys question if Netanyahu will do something to torpedo the whole thing with his continued war against Lebanon. In England, a special election could reshape British politics and set up a direct challenge to Prime Minister Keir Starmer. Meanwhile, a spate of developments across England, Italy, France, and Switzerland signal increasing growth for far-right movements in Europe. In Trump world, there’s both good and very bad news: Trump backed down on installing Bill Pulte as Director of National Intelligence after bipartisan pushback, and the dismantling of USAID continues to have devastating real-world consequences. And finally, with the World Cup in full swing, Tommy and Ben take a moment to enjoy the fans, from Scots drinking their way across, to Mexican and Korean fans bonding over tequila, and Nigerian fans flying all the way to Mexico just to root against South Africa. At the end of the show, Tommy speaks to CNN’s Senior International Correspondent Frederik Pleitgen, about what he saw and heard on his latest reporting trip on the ground in Iran.

programme.title: What a Day (Pride Persists Even Under Trump)
programme.desc:
Pride Month is here. It’s a month to celebrate the achievements of LGBTQ Americans and the impact they’ve had on our past and present. But it’s also a weird and very scary time for a lot of people. So what do we do now — at a time that somehow feels both great yet increasingly scary? To find out, we spoke with Human Rights Campaign President Kelley Robinson.
And in headlines, Iran’s top diplomat says the tentative deal to end the war would require Israel to withdraw from Lebanon, House Judiciary Ranking Member Jamie Raskin announces an investigation into FBI Director Kash Patel, and Vice President JD Vance braves the most intimidating interview known to man.

programme.title: Keep It (Full Disclosure Day with Matt Rogers and Kyle Buchanan)
programme.desc: Louis Virtel is joined by culture reporter Kyle Buchanan to discuss pop it-girl Olivia Rodrigo's new album before diving into Steven Spielberg's new movie Disclosure Day and whether he still has his finger on the pulse. Plus, Matt Rogers stops by to chat about the Culture Awards, podcasting and his new movie “Stop! That! Train!”

programme.title: Assembly Required with Stacey Abrams (How Christian Nationalism Threatens Democracy)
programme.desc: Christian nationalism is an extremist, anti-democratic ideology rooted in the belief that the United States should be a nation for Christians to the exclusion of all others. In modern times, the Trump administration and its Republican allies have wielded this ideology as a weapon to divide Americans and implement an agenda via plans like the infamous Project 2025 that eviscerates the rights of immigrants and the LGBTQ+ community, questions the rights of women to vote, restores a freedom to discriminate against others and targets reproductive rights. This week, in response to a listener question asking what Christian nationalism has to do with the central tenets of Christianity, Stacey shares her own experience as a progressive, democratic Christian, pulling back the curtain on a core truth: the malice and hatred preached by right-wing religious leaders who shape our politics has nothing to do with Jesus’s actual teachings. She’s joined by Bishop William Barber, president of Repairers of the Breach, co-chair of the Poor People’s Campaign, and professor at Yale Divinity School and Father Greg Boyle, Jesuit priest, founder of Homeboy Industries, and author. Together, they break down the threat Christian nationalism poses to democracy and show how faith, at its best, can be a powerful force for justice and progress. This inspiring conversation has so much to offer all our listeners, whether they come from a Christian background, some other faith background, or no faith at all.

programme.title: Lovett or Leave It (Boo York City)
programme.desc: The Big Apple spits out a worm, Trump attacks California’s elections, and Spencer Pratt packs up his dreams of mayoral stardom. This week, Michael Urie lies down on Lovett’s couch and analyzes his feelings about Harrison Ford; Kel Cripe lays out a Pride month's worth of regulations in They/Them’s the Rules, and we put the show to rest with a nice warm cup of Second Thoughts.

programme.title: What a Day (America Icing Out World Cup Fans)
programme.desc:
The World Cup is the biggest annual sporting event in the world. And the first game is tomorrow. This year’s competition is being hosted by three countries for the first time: the US, Canada, and Mexico. Already, fans of Argentina, Cote d’Ivoire, and other countries have flooded social media with their journeys to watch their favorite teams play. But with the World Cup, as with most things, comes… a lot of politics. We spoke with Bill Connelly to find out how politics is impacting the event. He’s a staff writer for ESPN covering soccer and college football.
And in headlines, Trump continues to threaten Iran, inflation hits its highest in three years, and Democrats “nominate the guy with the nazi tattoo” in the Maine Democratic primary for U.S. Senate.

programme.title: Runaway Country with Alex Wagner (Grifter In Chief)
programme.desc: The levels of corruption Americans are witnessing are both historic and astounding. This week, Alex speaks to Pro Publica reporter Robert Faturechi, who broke the story that the Department of Defense gave a $620,000,000 loan to a company affiliated with Donald Trump Jr. Then she’s joined by Pod Save the World host Ben Rhodes to talk about how everything from the UFC cage match on the White House lawn, to Ivanka Trump’s island development in Albania are indicative of the unprecedented grift, and limitless appetite for self enrichment of the Trump family. Be sure to pick up a copy of Ben’s new book, All We Say: The Battle for American Identity: A History of the United States in 15 Speeches.

programme.title: Hysteria (Two Steps Forward One Step Back w. Jennifer Siebel Newsom)
programme.desc: First Partner of California, Jennifer Siebel Newsom, joins Hysteria for a conversation about her status as a right-wing media target and her new film, Miss Representation: Rise Up. Erin and Alyssa also recap Graham Platner’s slew of scandals that led up to him winning the Democratic nomination for Maine’s Senate seat, discuss Bari Weiss’ next media move, and check in on the latest news from the Epstein files. Then they wrap up with a petty conversation about Gwyneth Paltrow’s politics.

programme.title: Oliver Goes Broke
programme.desc: The residents of Hooterville assume that Oliver Douglas must be broke when Lisa is spotted looking for work and standing in line at the soup kitchen. But assumptions in this town, even logical ones, are bound to be wrong.

programme.title: The Great Mayoralty Campaign
programme.desc: There is the old adage that warns never to discuss politics with your spouse... but what if you are both running for the same office?! That predicament comes true when Oliver and Lisa face each other in the Hooterville mayoral election.

programme.title: Eb's Double Trouble
programme.desc: Lisa and Oliver try to sort out of the troubles of fools in love. The problems begin when Eb invites both his girlfriend and another young woman to the same dance, while Arnold the pig falls for not one, but two attractive bovines.

programme.title: Apple Picking Time
programme.desc: Oliver is having a tough time. He has no one to help him pick the apples from his orchard, and he's promised to teach Lisa how to drive. The neighbors are all injured from assisting other harvests, and Lisa has a run-in with a sheriff.

programme.title: Enterprising Eb
programme.desc: Eb feels the time is right to settle down and marry Darlene. However, he has nowhere near the money it will take to make a down payment on a house. With the help of the Douglases, who have given him two acres of land, Eb applies for a loan.

programme.title: The High Cost Of Loving
programme.desc: Eb believes he has found his destiny when an accounting course he has enrolled in turns out to be acting workshop. All the world's a stage. Ed dives into acting and turns every simple interaction at the Douglas farm into a starring role.

programme.title: The Liberation Movement
programme.desc: After Lisa attends a Women's Liberation League meeting, she gives Oliver a scolding for denying her equal rights and demands to swap chores. While Lisa does a stellar job at Oliver's work, Oliver's attempts at hers leave something to be desired.

programme.title: Charlie, Homer And Natasha
programme.desc: Oliver refuses to take Lisa to New York City to attend the wedding anniversary of an old friend. Meanwhile, Eb, always up to something, has a new invisible friend named Charlie. To get her way, Lisa introduces her own invisible friend... Natasha.

programme.title: The Engagement Ring
programme.desc: Lisa gives the financially-challenged Eb her engagement ring to present to Darlene, his longtime sweetheart, so that he can pop the question. The ring is reportedly valued at $2,000, however, when Darlene's father has it appraised, it's a shocker.

programme.title: The Free Paint Job
programme.desc: The Douglases are offered a free paint job on their house and barn so long as they allow the paint company free advertising on their barn wall. Meanwhile, Lisa tries to make spaghetti for Oliver's upcoming birthday. Will it prove im-pasta-ble?

programme.title: Son Of Drobny
programme.desc: Lisa hosts the son of WWII hero Drobny, and all of Hooterville gets excited in anticipation of a surge of tourists. Trouble is, this hero was a duck, as is his son. Oliver tried to warn everyone they were making too much fuss over feathers.

programme.title: The Wedding Deal
programme.desc: Young lovers Eb and Darlene are just weeks away from their wedding day, but they must choose the marriage venue. It's hard to decide between a church and a car wash. At least it is for Eb, who is still looking for a way to pay for it all.

programme.title: Star Witness
programme.desc: While staying with the Douglases, Arnold the Pig witnesses a bank robbery when he goes with the Douglases on an errand in Pixley. When Lisa asks him to describe the two robbers, Arnold, reliving the moment, loses his voice from fear.

programme.title: A Girl For Drobny
programme.desc: Lisa worries about Drobny the duck when the water fowl stops eating and sleeping and suffers headaches. Eb suggests the duck needs a duck girlfriend. Lisa agrees and goes about town trying to the right partner for Drobny.

programme.title: The Carpenter's Ball
programme.desc: Oliver refuses to take Lisa to the annual Carpenter's Ball because he thinks the attendees are too eccentric for his liking. But Lisa has her own motives to attend. She is trying to get a romance sparked between two local singles.

programme.title: Lisa, The Psychologist
programme.desc: When Oliver decides to attend night school and enrolls in a farming class, Lisa does the same, taking psychology. Before long, many of the residents of Hooterville are lining up for appointments with the eminent Dr. Lisa.

programme.title: Hawaiian Honeymoon
programme.desc: Aloha! The Douglases vacation in Hawaii. But the daughter of the hotel manager needs to keep secret that she double booked the honeymoon suite. The "sweet" surprise? While Lisa and Oliver settle in, they are unaware that the other room is occupied.

programme.title: Uncle Fester's Illness
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she an Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family Splurges
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: Cousin Itt Visits The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family In Court
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: Amnesia In The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: Thing Is Missing
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: Crisis In The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: Lurch And His Harpsicord
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: Morticia, The Breadwinner
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family And The Spaceman
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: My Son, The Chimp
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: Morticia's Favorite Charity
programme.desc: Moriticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: Progress And The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: Uncle Fester's Toupee
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: Cousin Itt And The Vocational Counselor
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: Lurch, The Teenage Idol
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Winning Of Morticia Addams
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight, members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Case Against Condoms & Fake Friendship
programme.desc: Why do humans act so complicated? We’re simple creatures, farts are funny, everyone does awkward stuff, yet we all pretend we don’t. Maybe life gets better when you lean into the weird instead of hiding it. So how do you embrace being different and find the fun instead of stressing about it? Expect to learn how Rick’s brain works, what his favourite show and jokes are and how they shaped him, the top things that are difficult to look cool while doing, why using "condoms" with friends are useless, how to handle our people pleasing tendencies for good, why humans are so hard to interact with at times, the awkward feelings of becoming intimate with someone, the biggest message Rick Glassman wants to give out in the world and much more…

programme.title: The Most Important Daily Habits For Health & Longevity
programme.desc: Determining the best actions to take for enhancing our health and extending our lives has grown more challenging. There are an unlimited number of wellness approaches at our disposal, thankfully Dr Patrick has dedicated her professional life to identifying the most evidence-based strategies for improving our health and longevity. Expect to learn if low omega 3s are worse for you than smoking cigarettes, what Rhonda's thoughts are on vaping and nicotine, the best foods to boost your metabolism, the once a week workout that can de-age your heart by 20 years, how to get the benefits of heat exposure if you don't have a sauna, the terrifying health risks of being too sedentary and much more...

programme.title: Why Fear & Horror Feels Kinda Good
programme.desc: Why are we drawn to fear? This fascination often balances us the edge of life and death, infused with a dash of excitement. From his beginnings as a Navy SEAL to becoming a renowned YouTuber, Mr. Ballen possesses a unique storytelling talent. He captivates us with some of the most spine-chilling true stories, drawn both from his experiences and the lives of others. Expect to learn why so many people are obsessed with True Crime and scary stories, the 3 terrifying but true stories MrBallen has prepared in this episode today, what being a NAVY Seal taught MrBallen about life & the backlash he has gotten from the NAVY Seal community by sharing his story, what it means to live a good life, if there is life after death, how to reinvent your entire life, what it takes to tell a good story and much more...

programme.title: Why Is Everyone So Emotionally Fragile?
programme.desc: Emotional maturity is a difficult thing to truly come by. Making your needs known, setting boundaries, being able to disappoint people without being afraid. If it's such an important skill, why is it so hard to discover how to develop it? Expect to learn how Whitney has been changed since becoming a mother, why Whitney has been thinking about circumcision so much, what codependence is and how to overcome it, why your niceness might be narcissism in disguise, why the news and memes are moving at such an insane velocity right now and much more...
